noNotesFound: No canvas found. Click "+" to create one.
noCollectionFound: No collections found. Click "+" above to create a multi-chapter folder book!
convertBasicConfirm: Are you sure you want to convert back to a standard single-document note? Your sub-chapters, storyboard cards, and database logs will be safely kept, but the multi-tab novel workbench view will be collapsed.
noChaptersYet: No chapters yet. Click plus to create chapter 1!
deleteChapterConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this chapter? This will wipe out all its specific body draft contents.
noActiveChapter: No active chapter. Click plus on the left directory to create, or click a chapter row to start writing.
removeToStandalone: Remove from folder to flat note list
deleteCollectionConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete collection "{{title}}"? This will remove all associated chapters, storyboard plot cards, and character databases permanently.
templateSubtitle: Generate rich recommended multi-chapter structures for novels, PRDs, and reports with one click
backToBasicNoteTip: 💡 Rest assured: You can always click the "Exit Book Mode" action in the top toolbar to go back. Your multi-chapter structures are cached securely in background state.
standardDraftDesc: Ideal for jotting ideas down, long-form Markdown entries, or checklist logs inside a single clean blank space.
bookModeDesc: Upgrade instantly with character ledger bibles, multi-card story boards, total progress meters, and smart contextual AI prompts.
chapterLedgerDesc: Categorize drafts seamlessly. Create, delete, re-sequence, and mark progress of individual chapters directly.
characterBibleDesc: Store details of protagonists, relationships, and motivations. Serves as consistent background anchors during AI expansions.
storyboardDesc: Plot complex story structures, plot twists, and research guidelines using aesthetic cards. Keep your train of thought organized.
selectCreativeWorkflow: Choose the Best Workflow For Your Ideas
multiChapterWritingSuite: Multi-Chapter Writing Suite / Professional Novel Engine
